Petition For Order That Asset Constitutes A Trust Asset And That Scot L. Rife Is One-Third Beneficiary Under Said Trust
Off Calendar Jun-27-2016 Continued To Jul-25-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order That Asset Constitutes A Trust Asset And That Scot L. Rife Is One-Third Beneficiary Under Said Trust
Off Calendar Feb-10-2016 Continued To Jun-27-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Sheppard & Juliana Pisani for Harvey Riffe & Scott Riffe who are present in court. Yasmin Gilani for (respondent) Sandra Moore.

The Court asked about the status of mediation. Ms. Pisani reported that they have a signed stipulation by all parties, that they would like to present it with an order to the court and that they are hoping to proceed by stipulation. Mr. Sheppard stated that the trustee is present in court, that attorney Dennis Peterson who drafted the trust is in court as well, that he can confirm that the trust says that 1/3 of the property is to go to Scott Riffe, that Mr. Peterson, Harvey and Scott all concur that Mary Jane intended for 1/3 to go to Scott and that the objecting party is no longer objecting. Ms. Gilani stated that they are in agreement, that they have signed the stipulation and that they want a continuance to allow the sale to be completed. Mr. Sheppard stated that a continuance is logical, that there is a catch 22, that they are trying to close escrow in 60 days and that the title company will want a signed order allowing the trust to sell the 1/3 interest. Ms. Pisani stated that they have a signed settlement allowing escrow to close in 60 days with one 30-day extension and that the addendums need to be re-signed. Ms. Gilani stated that they are not opposed to 90 days. The Court stated that it is not going to promise anything. Ms. Pisani stated that the sale documents provided for 6/30/16 for court confirmation. Ms. Gilani stated that there may be a problem with exhibit A. Ms. Pisani stated that the purchase agreement timelines are not triggered until the court issues an order. The petition for order that asset constitutes a trust asset and that Scott Riffe is one-third beneficiary under said trust was continued to June 27, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
